narrative.description: Namco's polygon revival of the Xevious formula layers air-and-ground dual targeting over forward-scrolling 3D valleys, tasking pilots with bombing surface installations while dogfighting aerial Solvalou threats.
narrative.core_loop: Fly through 3D valleys, fire air-to-air shots at flying enemies and bombs at ground targets simultaneously, then defeat area guardians to advance.

mechanics.map_notes: Separate air laser and ground bomb reticles must be managed concurrently.
mechanics.expression: Separate air laser and ground bomb reticles must be managed concurrently.

mechanics.map_notes: Altitude over valleys determines which ground targets and aerial threats are in range.
mechanics.expression: Altitude over valleys determines which ground targets and aerial threats are in range.

mechanics.map_notes: Areas clear when hidden Andor Genesis cores and surface targets are destroyed.
mechanics.expression: Areas clear when hidden Andor Genesis cores and surface targets are destroyed.

mechanics.map_notes: Air and ground weapons fire on separate instant triggers.
mechanics.expression: Air and ground weapons fire on separate instant triggers.

mechanics.map_notes: Solvalou shield energy depletes from enemy hits.
mechanics.expression: Solvalou shield energy depletes from enemy hits.

mechanics.map_notes: Classic Xevious craft emit the series' signature bullet curtains.
mechanics.expression: Classic Xevious craft emit the series' signature bullet curtains.

mechanics.map_notes: Area guardians reuse iconic Xevious boss movement loops in 3D.
mechanics.expression: Area guardians reuse iconic Xevious boss movement loops in 3D.

mechanics.map_notes: Large turrets charge visible beam sweeps before firing.
mechanics.expression: Large turrets charge visible beam sweeps before firing.

mechanics.map_notes: Final bosses transition between aerial and ground assault modes.
mechanics.expression: Final bosses transition between aerial and ground assault modes.

mechanics.map_notes: Valley walls and terrain force altitude adjustments.
mechanics.expression: Valley walls and terrain force altitude adjustments.

mechanics.map_notes: Area select resumes from last cleared zone.
mechanics.expression: Area select resumes from last cleared zone.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Xevious 3D/G+ through its core shooter loop.
